voice_strengths.label: Preserve
voice_strengths.description: Keep the user's words and rhythm unless a phrase is the problem.

voice_strengths.label: Balanced
voice_strengths.description: Preserve style, but prioritize clarity and tone safety.

voice_strengths.label: Polish
voice_strengths.description: Edit more freely for clarity while keeping the user's intent.

voice_strengths.label: Rewrite
voice_strengths.description: Rewrite aggressively when the draft is rough.
